# switchlang

> Adds switch blocks to the Python language.

## Docs

### API Reference

#### The switch block
> The context manager that gives Python an explicit switch statement. Use it in a `with` block, register cases, then read `result`.


- [switch](https://mkennedy.codes/docs/python-switch/reference/switch.html): switch is a module-level implementation of the switch statement for Python

#### Range helpers
> Helpers for mapping ranges of values to a single case.


- [closed_range](https://mkennedy.codes/docs/python-switch/reference/closed_range.html): Creates a closed range that allows you to specify a case
